control.content:
General
Features
Content
Meta Accounts
Sources Accounts
Results
Playback '

item.property: Choose any custom background you would like to use within Fen

Enable this and Fen will limit the threads enacted simultaneously. Best to leave this disabled unless you are having issues with your device not supporting high numbers of concurrent threads in python
Choose the maximum active concurrent threads Fen will be limited to
Choose the manner in which Fen handles updates
Choose the delay time before Fen checks for updates after Kodi start
Leave this setting as default unless you wsh to update Fen through a different user repository. If you do, enter the Github Username of the new github location
Choose your location for Importing and Exporting Fen settings
Choose Data to include in DataSync
Choose here which Fen databases you wish to include in the DataSync
Enable this and Fen will sync from the DataSync Folder to this install on startup and sync back to the DataSync Folder periodically
Choose the interval between DataSync. This is set in minutes
Choose the theme Fen will use for custom windows. Choices are Light, Medium and Dark
Choose the Opacity Fen will use for custom window themes. Choose between 10% - 100%
Choose the correct UTC offset based on your location
Choose your download location for Movies
Choose your download location for TV Shows
Choose your download location for Premium files. Includes downloads from debrid service caches or Easynews
Choose your download location for Images
Choose what content is included within the Extras window
Choose how the content within the Extras window is ordered
Choose the function and order of the buttons in the Extras window. You can set separate button functions for Movies and TV Shows
Enable this and the Extras menu will show ratings from more services than just TMDb. Must have a valid OMDb API assigned in the Accounts settings for this to show
Choose the ratings displayed from OMDb
Enable Poster Ratings (RPDb) for Extras Lists
Choose this and the widgets displayed in the Extras window will show RPDb ratings posters
Choose the Open Action when a Movie is selected in Fen. Choices Are None, Open Extras, Open Movie Set, Both. "Both" will open the Movie Set if available or open Extras
Choose the Open Action when a TV Show is selected in Fen. Choices Are None or Open Extras
[I]Enter an RPDb API Key in Meta Accounts[/I]
Navigate within these settings to Meta Accounts->RPDb (Ratings Posters) and enter an API key to access this
Choose which media types utilize that Rated Posters provided by RPDb. Choices are None, Movies, TV Shows or Both
Choose the format used for RPDb Posters. Choices are Default, Blocks or Rounded
[I]Enter API Keys for Google/Groq for access[/I]
Navigate to Meta Accounts to enter your Google AI and/or Groq AI API Keys for access to this feature

Choose the order AI Models will be used for Similar Titles. Top will be used first, bottom used last. You will normally want to keep this order as default. If you don't have an API Key for the model listed, it will be skipped
Choose the maximum number of AI Similar Results returned by Fen
Choose what content is included within the Context Menu
Choose how the content within the Context Menu is ordered
Enable this and Fen will attempt to paginate lists when possible. This is mainly applicable to personal lists
Choose the limit of pagination when within Fen
Choose the limit of pagination for Fen widgets

Enable this and Fen will control view types used within the addon. This can be disabled if the skin you are using has a helper that provides a "lock view" type function. If enabled, views can be set in Tools->Set Views within the addon
Contents Sort Order For Watched Progress
Choose the sort order for your In Progress media
Choose the sort order for your Watched media
Single Episode Display Format - Within Addon
Choose the display format Fen uses when naming single episodes within the addon. Applicable for lists like Next Episodes, In Progress Episodes etc
Choose the display format Fen uses when naming single episodes for widgets. Applicable for lists like Next Episodes, In Progress Episodes etc
Include Fen Favorites in Next Episodes
Choose to include your Fen Favorites within Fens Next Episodes
Choose whether Fen refreshes widgets based on a set timer. You should set a value here if you are using random widgets from Fen, and wish for their contents to update between Kodi starts
Enable this and Fen will show a notification whenever widgets are refreshed by the timer
Hide Next Page Item in Widgets
Enable this and the "Next Page" item will be hidden in Fen widgets
[I]Enter an RPDb API Key in Meta Accounts[/I]
Navigate within these settings to Meta Accounts->RPDb (Ratings Posters) and enter an API key to access this
Choose which media types utilize that Rated Posters provided by RPDb. Choices are None, Movies, TV Shows or Both
Choose the format used for RPDb Posters. Choices are Default, Blocks or Rounded
Enter here your Trakt Client ID key
Enter here your Trakt Client Secret key
Enter here your TMDb API key
Test if your TMDb API is activated and working
Enter here your OMDb API key. This will allow you to utilize extra ratings information in Fens Extras window
Enter here your RPDb API key. This will allow you to utilize posters that include built in ratings information when available
Enter here your Gemini/Gemma AI API key. This will allow you to utilize the features within Fen that use AI, such as Browse AI Similar
Enter here your Groq AI API key. This will allow you to utilize the features within Fen that use AI, such as Browse AI Similar
Enable this to use external scrapers. No support is provided when you choose to use external scrapers within Fen
Choose the external scraper module to use within Fen. No support is provided when you choose to use external scrapers within Fen
Open the External Scraper settings. The settings of the module chosen above will be opened
Authorize your Real Debrid account and use it within Fen
Enable the use of your Real Debrid account
Revoke authorization of your Real Debrid account
Add Resolved Debrid Cache to Cloud
Choose which resolved media is automatically added to your Real Debrid Cloud. All media or only show packs
Enable this and Fen will search your Real Debrid Cloud for media
Enable this and Fen will perform extra name matching functions on your Real Debrid Cloud results. Will help to limit incorrect results, but may also filter some relevant results
Enable this and Fen will search for results in your Real Debrid Cloud before checking other enabled scrapers
Choose the order in which Real Debrid results appear in relation to any other active accounts. The lower the number, the higher the sort order
Enable this and Fen will use an alternate base url for RD. This may circumvent any blocks being performed
Authorize your Premiumize account and use it within Fen
Enable the use of your Premiumize account
Revoke authorization of your Premiumize account
Add Resolved Debrid Cache to Cloud
Choose which resolved media is automatically added to your Premiumize Cloud. All media or only show packs
Enable this and Fen will search your Premiumize Cloud for media
Enable this and Fen will perform extra name matching functions on your Premiumize Cloud results. Will help to limit incorrect results, but may also filter some relevant results
Enable this and Fen will search for results in your Premiumize Cloud before checking other enabled scrapers
Choose the order in which Premiumize results appear in relation to any other active accounts. The lower the number, the higher the sort order
Authorize your Off Cloud account and use it within Fen Light
Enable the use of your Off Cloud account
Revoke authorization of your Off Cloud account
Add Resolved Debrid Cache to Cloud
Choose which resolved media is automatically added to your Off Cloud Cloud. All media or only show packs
Enable this and Fen Light will search your Off Cloud Cloud for media
Enable this and Fen Light will perform extra name matching functions on your Off Cloud Cloud results. Will help to limit incorrect results, but may also filter some relevant results
Enable this and Fen Light will search for results in your Off Cloud Cloud before checking other enabled scrapers
Choose the order in which Off Cloud results appear in relation to any other active accounts. The lower the number, the higher the sort order
Authorize your TorBox account and use it within Fen
Enable the use of your TorBox account
Revoke authorization of your TorBox account
Add Resolved Debrid Cache to Cloud
Choose which resolved media is automatically added to your TorBox Cloud. All media or only show packs
Enable this and Fen will search your TorBox Cloud for media
Enable this and Fen will perform extra name matching functions on your TorBox Cloud results. Will help to limit incorrect results, but may also filter some relevant results
Enable this and Fen will search for results in your TorBox Cloud before checking other enabled scrapers
Choose the order in which TorBox results appear in relation to any other active accounts. The lower the number, the higher the sort order
Enable the use of your Easynews account
Enter the Login of your Easynews account
Enter the Password of your Easynews account
Enable this and Fen will perform extra name matching functions on your Easynews results. Will help to limit incorrect results, but may also filter some relevant results
Enable this and Fen will perform extra language filtering on your Easynews results. Will help to limit incorrect results, but may also filter some relevant results
Choose which languages you wish to include in Easynews results
Enable this and Fen will search for results from your Easynews service before checking other enabled scrapers
Choose the order in which Easynews results appear in relation to any other active accounts. The lower the number, the higher the sort order
Enable the use of any local media folder locations i.e. NAS drives, HDDs etc
Choose this to activate a settings window allowing you to set the location of up to 5 devices containing local media
Enable this and Fen will perform extra name matching functions on your local media folders results. Will help to limit incorrect results, but may also filter some relevant results
Enable this and Fen will search for results from your local media folders before checking other enabled scrapers
Enable this and Fen will ignore any Quality or Size filters when processing local media folders results
Choose the order in which Media Folders results appear in relation to any other active accounts. The lower the number, the higher the sort order
Choose the amount of time Fen will allow all scrapers to search for results
Choose the priority ordering performed by Fen before displaying source results
Retry with Filters Ignored When No Results
Choose whether to rescrape ignoring filters when there are no results. Choices are Off, Auto or Prompt
Choose the method used to filter results by their size using entered internet speed
Enter here your internet line speed. It is a good idea to choose a value slightly below your true internet speed, although Fen will still reduce this value by 10% before filtering results by size
Choose filter settings. They can be INCLUDED or EXCLUDED
Choose when to Sort results to the top. The options are NONE, SOURCE SELECT, AUTOPLAY or BOTH
- Set Filters for Sort to Top

Choose video and audio properties that will be sorted to the top of the sources list. Choose up to 5 different parameters to be used, in order of importance. "Sort to Top" settings involving Debrid Cache and Folder Scraper results will take priority over these 5 params
Choose the method used to provide highlight colors to source results. The options are PROVIDER, QUALITY, or the use of a SINGLE COLOR
Choose Single color for all results
Enable this for Movies to play automatically when selected
Choose the Quality properties allowed for source select results
Choose the Quality properties allowed for autoplay results
Enable this and Fen will show an alert towards the end of a movie if the movie contains during or after credit stingers
Choose when Fen Light will automatically resume playback of an in-progress Movie
Enable this for Episodes to play automatically when selected
Choose the Quality properties allowed for source select results
Choose the Quality properties allowed for autoplay results
Enable this and Fen will automatically play the next episode of a TV Show at the end of the episode currently being watched
Choose the Intros that Fen will skip. Choices are Off, Skip Intro, Skip Recap, or Skip Both
Choose when Fen Light will automatically resume playback of an in-progress Episode
Limit Resolve Attempts to Selected Result

Enable this and Fen will limit the playback attempts to only the source result chosen. If disabled, Fen will potentially try 15 results of similar properties to your chosen source result until it is able to successfully resolve and playback
Check Volume Before Start of Playback
Enable this and Fen will attempt to check the current level of volume within Kodi, and adjust it downwards if it is exceeding a set level
Choose the maximum allowed volume level
